# Cursor Changelog - Feature Announcements

## Mar 25, 2026
**Self-hosted Cloud Agents** - Run Cursor cloud agents entirely within your own network. Offers the same capabilities as Cursor-hosted agents: isolated VMs, full development environments, multi-model harnesses, and plugins. Keeps code and tool execution on-premise.

## Mar 19, 2026
**Composer 2** - "frontier-level coding performance with strong results on challenging coding tasks." Pricing: Standard ($0.50/M input, $2.50/M output tokens) and Fast ($1.50/M input, $7.50/M output tokens).

## Mar 11, 2026
**New Marketplace Plugins** - Over 30 new plugins from partners including Atlassian, Datadog, GitLab, Glean, Hugging Face, monday.com, and PlanetScale. Plugins enable reading, writing, and actions across development stacks via MCPs.

## Mar 5, 2026
**Automations** - Always-on agents triggered by schedules or events from Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty, and webhooks. Agents access cloud sandboxes, MCPs, configurable models, and a memory tool for learning across runs.

## Mar 4, 2026
**Cursor in JetBrains IDEs** - Available in IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm via Agent Client Protocol. Supports frontier models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Cursor for agent-driven development.

## Mar 3, 2026 (Version 2.6)
**MCP Apps** - Interactive UIs for charts, diagrams, and whiteboards from Amplitude, Figma, and tldraw directly in Cursor.

**Team Marketplaces** - Teams and Enterprise admins can create private plugin marketplaces with governance and access controls.

**Desktop Improvements** (15 items) - Parallel Debug sessions, stale code cleanup, adaptive instrumentation logging, browser tool context menus and zoom, plan file content in autocomplete, image galleries, multiline Plan mode, faster modals, improved workflows, better PR context, smoother tool-use flows, reliable MCP setup, clearer policies, enhanced Slack integration, longer session reliability.

**Desktop Bug Fixes** (10 items) - Web link fixes, refresh behavior, branch divergence handling, review comments accuracy, diff display preservation, MCP configuration stability, model picker fixes, permission inconsistencies, long-running workflow reliability, Debug port allocation.

**Web Improvements & Fixes** (2 items) - Dashboard enhancements and layout improvements.

## Last Fetched
2026-03-30
